arguments.code: {"basicWidget":{"group":[{"id":"492e41f1-e839-4d85-ad7c-8a0ddedc0505","label":"All Users Table"},{"id":"cba2ba3b-9a7e-475a-8623-80888d733a4d","label":"All users pending opps"},{"id":"8daa7130-ae88-490b-9772-08dbd72e95e2","label":"All Users Resolved Opps"}]}}

queries.name: User pending opps
queries.templated_query:
WITH assign_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(assigned_to,',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) ) 
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')),assign_split_details AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(assigned_to,',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value,2) AS Value, opportunity_type
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details` AS details
LEFT
JOIN `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10) )<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')), 

pending AS  
(SELECT * FROM (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp, opportunity_type
FROM assign_split_details
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split_details.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
{{ if (ne .Username "") }} and assigned_to = {{ .Username }} {{ end }}
GROUP BY assigned_to, opportunity_type
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC))
SELECT pending.assigned_to AS assigned_to, 
IFNULL(pending.sum_opp,0) as value, opportunity_type
FROM pending 
--where pending.assigned_to = {{ .User }}

queries.name: User Resolved Opps
queries.templated_query:
WITH assign_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(assigned_to, '\"', ''), ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), ',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value, opportunity_type
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1), 
assign_split_details AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value, opportunity_type
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4')
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1),
resolved AS  (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp, opportunity_type
FROM assign_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
{{ if (ne .Username "") }} and assigned_to = {{ .Username }} {{ end }}
GROUP BY assigned_to, opportunity_type
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC))
SELECT resolved.assigned_to AS assigned_to, ifnull(sum_opp,0) as value, opportunity_type
FROM resolved
--where resolved.assigned_to = {{ .User }}

queries.name: User Outstanding Indicator
queries.templated_query:
WITH assign_split AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) ) 
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')),

assign_split_details AS (
    SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10)) 
<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')), 

pending AS  (
    SELECT * FROM (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp
FROM assign_split_details 
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split_details.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC)),

resolved AS  (
    SELECT * FROM (
SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp
FROM assign_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
{{ if (ne .Username "") }} and assigned_to = {{ .Username }} {{ end }}
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC))

SELECT IFNULL(pending.sum_opp,0) as pending_sum_opp FROM 
pending FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to
--where TRIM(TRIM(resolved.assigned_to), '\"') = {{ .User }}

queries.name: Opportunity Available Bar
queries.templated_query:
SELECT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}') as {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }},
round(sum(m_value*7),2) AS opportunity_gained
FROM KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details
WHERE level = 1 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
and JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}') is not null
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10) ) 
<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')   
{{ if (ne .Username "") }} and Username = {{ .Username }} {{ end }}
group by {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}, Date 
order by opportunity_gained desc
limit 5

queries.name: Costing query
queries.templated_query:
DECLARE  current_on_demand_price_per_tb INT64 DEFAULT 5;
DECLARE  new_on_demand_price_per_tb FLOAT64 DEFAULT 6.25;
DECLARE standard_edition_price FLOAT64 DEFAULT 0.04;
DECLARE standard_edition_factor FLOAT64 DEFAULT 1.5;

DECLARE dt_start DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-01-01 00:00:00") ;
DECLARE dt_end DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-06-18 23:59:59");
--SET @@dataset_project_id = 'my-project-id';



WITH
  seconds AS (
  SELECT

    period_start,
    SUM(period_slot_ms) AS period_slot_ms,
    SUM(period_slot_ms/1000)/(60*60) AS slot_hour,
  FROM
    `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS_TIMELINE_BY_PROJECT
  WHERE
    period_start BETWEEN dt_start AND dt_end
    AND reservation_id IS NULL
    AND job_id NOT LIKE 'script_%'
    AND period_slot_ms > 0
    AND total_bytes_billed > 0
    AND job_type ='QUERY'
  GROUP BY     period_start ),
  slots AS (
  SELECT

    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(period_start, MONTH) AS period_start,
    ROUND(SUM(slot_hour), 2) AS total_slot_hours_usage,
    -- Calculating the diff between the avalaible committed slots to the usage (per minute)
  FROM     seconds
  GROUP BY    period_start   ORDER BY     period_start ASC),
 jobs AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(creation_time, MONTH) AS creation_time,
    -- For on-demand projects the minimum bytes processed is 10MB, so need to account for that
    SUM(IF(COALESCE(total_bytes_billed, 0) / POW(1024, 2) < 10, 10*POW(1024, 2), COALESCE(total_bytes_billed, 0)) ) AS total_bytes_billed_on_demand,
  FROM
   `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS_BY_PROJECT
  WHERE
    creation_time BETWEEN dt_start AND dt_end
    AND reservation_id IS NULL
    AND job_id NOT LIKE 'script_%'
    AND total_slot_ms > 0     AND total_bytes_billed > 0  AND job_type = 'QUERY'
  GROUP BY
TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(creation_time, MONTH))
  SELECT

  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP("%m-%Y", period_start) as month,
  ROUND(total_bytes_billed_on_demand / POW(1024, 4), 2) AS TiB_billed,
  ROUND(total_bytes_billed_on_demand / POW(1024, 4) * new_on_demand_price_per_tb, 2) AS new_on_demand_price,
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage, 2) AS total_slot_hours_usage,
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*standard_edition_factor, 2) AS total_slot_hours_usage_factor,
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*0.04, 2) AS total_slot_hours_cost,
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*standard_edition_price*standard_edition_factor, 2) AS total_slot_hours_cost_factor_150,
  ROUND(ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*standard_edition_price*standard_edition_factor, 2)/
        ROUND(total_bytes_billed_on_demand / POW(1024, 4) * new_on_demand_price_per_tb, 2),2)*100 AS ratio_percantage,
FROM
  jobs
JOIN
  slots
ON
  jobs.creation_time = slots.period_start
ORDER BY
  slots.period_start ASC;

queries.name: Autoscaler upper limit
queries.templated_query:
DECLARE
  dt_start DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-01-01 00:00:00") ;
DECLARE
  dt_end DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-06-30 00:00:00");
--SET @@dataset_project_id = 'my-project-id';

WITH
  max_config AS (
  WITH
    p90_hour AS (
    SELECT
      TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(jbo.period_start, HOUR) AS usage_date,
      jbo.reservation_id,

      jbo.job_type,
      -- Aggregate total_slots_ms used for all jobs on this day and divide
      -- by the number of milliseconds in a day. Most accurate for days with consistent slot usage
      ROUND(SUM(jbo.period_slot_ms) / (1000 * 60 * 60)) AS sum_hourly_slot_usage_in_hours
    FROM
      `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS_TIMELINE_BY_PROJECT jbo
    WHERE
      (jbo.statement_type != "SCRIPT"
        OR jbo.statement_type IS NULL)
      AND jbo.job_type = 'QUERY'
      AND reservation_id IS NULL
      AND jbo.period_start BETWEEN dt_start
      AND dt_end-- Avoid duplicate byte counting in parent and children jobs.
    GROUP BY
      usage_date,

      jbo.job_type,
      jbo.reservation_id
    ORDER BY
      usage_date DESC)
  SELECT

    PERCENTILE_CONT(sum_hourly_slot_usage_in_hours,0.9) OVER() AS p90_hourly_slot_usage
  FROM
    p90_hour
    where sum_hourly_slot_usage_in_hours > 100
  LIMIT
    1 )
SELECT

dt_start,
dt_end,
  p90_hourly_slot_usage,
  CEIL(p90_hourly_slot_usage/100)*100 as inital_max_configuration
FROM
  max_config;

queries.templated_query:
WITH archive_split AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value * 7,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_archive` 
AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) )
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')),
details_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) 
AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_status` AS status ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10) )<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')),
pending AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp_pending
FROM details_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(details_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to 
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp_pending DESC)),
resolved AS (SELECT * FROM (
SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM archive_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(archive_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp_resolved DESC)), 
conv_rat AS ( SELECT assigned_to, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(sum_opp_resolved)/NULLIF(SUM(sum_opp_pending) + SUM(sum_opp_resolved),0),2),0) AS Efficiency_Rate
FROM ( 
SELECT IF(pending.assigned_to IS NULL, resolved.assigned_to, pending.assigned_to) AS assigned_to, IFNULL(pending.sum_opp_pending,0) AS sum_opp_pending, IFNULL(resolved.sum_opp_resolved,0) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM pending
FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to)
GROUP BY assigned_to), store_rat AS (SELECT assigned_to, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(sum_opp_resolved)/NULLIF(SUM(sum_opp_pending),0)*100,2),0) AS Store_Perc_Ratio
FROM (
SELECT IF(pending.assigned_to IS NULL, resolved.assigned_to, pending.assigned_to) AS assigned_to,
IFNULL(pending.sum_opp_pending,0) AS sum_opp_pending, IFNULL(resolved.sum_opp_resolved,0) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM pending 
FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to)GROUP BY assigned_to)
SELECT resolved.assigned_to AS Username, sum_opp_resolved AS Contribution, 
Efficiency_Rate
FROM resolved
FULL OUTER JOIN conv_rat
ON resolved.assigned_to = conv_rat.assigned_to
FULL OUTER JOIN store_rat
ON resolved.assigned_to = store_rat.assigned_to 
WHERE resolved.assigned_to IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY Contribution DESC
LIMIT 5

queries.name: Table 1 Franchise
Table 1 Franchise
Staging Table - Franchise
queries.templated_query:
WITH Table_1 AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(Franchise_Name) AS Franchise_Name,
    EXTR_Customer_Name,
    FS_Deal_Rating,
    Recourse_perc,
    IF((EXTR_90_Days + EXTR_90plus_Days) > 0, 'stage3', IF(EXTR_60_Days > 0, 'stage2', 'stage1')) AS Stage,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy
  FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN
)

SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 
    Franchise_Name, 
    EXTR_Customer_Name, 
    Date,
    CONCAT(
      CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
      END, ' ',
      CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Date) AS STRING)
    ) AS Year_Month,
    FS_Deal_Rating, 
    Recourse_perc, 
    EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN Stage = 'stage1' THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0), 0), 2) AS Stage_1_Perc,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN Stage = 'stage2' THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0), 0), 2) AS Stage_2_Perc,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN Stage = 'stage3' THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0), 0), 2) AS Stage_3_Perc
  FROM 
    Table_1
  WHERE 
    TRIM(Franchise_Name) != ''
    AND 1=1
{{if (ne .Franchise_name "") }} AND (Franchise_Name IN {{ .Franchise_name }} ) {{end}}
{{if (ne .FS_Deal_Rating "") }} AND (FS_Deal_Rating IN {{ .FS_Deal_Rating }} ) {{end}}
{{if (ne .EXTR_Customer_Name "") }} AND (EXTR_Customer_Name IN {{ .EXTR_Customer_Name }} ) {{end}}
{{ if (ne .DateSelectionStart "") }} AND Date >= PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .DateSelectionStart }}) {{ end }} 
{{ if (ne .DateSelectionEnd "") }} AND Date <= PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .DateSelectionEnd }}) {{ end }}

  GROUP BY 
    Franchise_Name,
    FS_Deal_Rating,
    Recourse_perc,
    Year_Month,
    EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy,
    EXTR_Customer_Name,
    Date

  ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Date), 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM Date), 
    Franchise_Name ASC
)
WHERE 
  1=1
  {{if (ne .Year_Month "") }} AND (Year_Month IN {{ .Year_Month }} ) {{end}}
LIMIT 100;

queries.name: Product Vs PV Per Month
queries.templated_query:
WITH 
    Data 
AS
( 
SELECT 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN 
GROUP BY 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000
)

,DateRange 
AS 
(
  SELECT 
    MAX(Date) AS max_date
  FROM 
    Data
)

,mainT
AS
(
SELECT 
    Product,
    m.Date As Date,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    CONCAT
    (
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END, ' ',
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)
    )  
    AS 
        Month_And_Year,
FROM
    Data m,
    DateRange r
WHERE 1=1
AND 
    m.Date 
        BETWEEN 
            DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  
        AND
            r.max_date
GROUP BY 
    Product,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    Month_And_Year,
    m.Date
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC
LIMIT 3000
)

SELECT
    Product,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = max_date THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_3,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_2,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_1
FROM
    mainT,
    DateRange r
GROUP BY
    Product

queries.name: Good Case SVI
queries.templated_query:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,

     from KEYSTONE_DKSH_HK.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
),
KEY as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
from KEYSTONE.DKSH_HK_impact_graph 
    GROUP BY Month
) 
SELECT 
     ROUND(AVG(SalesValue), 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(m_value), 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone,

FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Month = KEY.Month
WHERE SALES.Month BETWEEN DATE('2023-02-01') AND DATE('2024-05-01')

queries.templated_query:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) * (1.10 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_1,
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) * (1.15 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_2,

     from KEYSTONE_DKSH_HK.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
),
KEY as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
from KEYSTONE.DKSH_HK_impact_graph 
    GROUP BY Month
) 
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, Fair_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
Good_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (
SELECT Date, 
NSV_Without_Keystone,
SUM(NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS NSV_Without_Keystone_Cum,

SUM(Fair_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Fair_Case_with_Keystone,
SUM(Good_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Good_Case_with_Keystone,
SUM(Excellent_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,

from (
SELECT 
    SALES.Month as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value, 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_1, 0), 2) as Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_2, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Month = KEY.Month
WHERE SALES.Month BETWEEN DATE('2023-02-01') AND DATE('2024-05-01')
ORDER BY Date)
)

queries.name: Regional Category Distribution
queries.templated_query:
WITH top20 AS (
  SELECT 
    {{ .Product }},
    SUM({{ .Value }}) AS {{ .Value }}
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
    {{ .PSU }}
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
    AND {{ .Product }} IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.{{ .Product }}') AS {{ .Product }}
      FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details`
      --WHERE opportunity_Type = '939e5ed7-02d1-40b4-b8ce-3cb9aea64148'
    )
  GROUP BY 
    {{ .Product }}
  ORDER BY 
    {{ .Value }} DESC
  LIMIT 20
),
total AS (
  SELECT 
    LOWER({{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}) AS {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }},
    {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }},
    COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) AS Customer_Count
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
    {{ .PSU }}
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
  GROUP BY 
    {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}
)
SELECT 
  {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }},
  {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }},
  ROUND(100 * SUM(cust_count) / NULLIF((AVG(customer_count) * AVG(sku_total)), 0), 2) AS Distribution
FROM (
  SELECT 
    a.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }},
    a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }},
    {{ .Product }},
    COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) AS cust_count,
    Customer_Count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Product }}) OVER (PARTITION BY a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}) AS sku_total
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW` a
  LEFT JOIN 
    total ON LOWER(a.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}) = total.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }} AND a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }} = total.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    {{ .DefaultFilters3 }}
    {{ .PSU }}
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
    AND a.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }} IS NOT NULL
    AND a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }} IS NOT NULL
    AND {{ .Product }} IN (SELECT DISTINCT {{ .Product }} FROM top20)
  GROUP BY 
    {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product }}, Customer_Count
)
GROUP BY 
  {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }};

queries.name: Most distributed product
queries.templated_query:
DECLARE {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }} STRING;

SET {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }} = (
    SELECT CONCAT('("', STRING_AGG(DISTINCT {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, '", "'), '")')
    FROM (
        WITH total AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER({{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) AS {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }},
                COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) AS Customer_Count
            FROM 
                KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW 
            WHERE 
                1 = 1 
                {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
                {{ .PSU }}
                AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
            GROUP BY {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}
        )
        SELECT 
            REPLACE(a.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, '/', '_') AS {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }},
            {{ .Product }},
            ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution
        FROM 
            KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW a
        LEFT JOIN 
            total ON LOWER(a.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) = total.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}
        WHERE 
            1 = 1 
            {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
            AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
        GROUP BY 
            {{ .Product }}, {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, Customer_Count
        ORDER BY 
            Distribution ASC
    )
);

EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format("""with bigtable as (with total as (Select lower({{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, count(distinct {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) Customer_Count from KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW where 1=1 {{ .DefaultFilters2 }} {{ .PSU }} and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", {{ .Date }}) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}') group by {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) select REPLACE(a.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, '/', '_') {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product }}, ROUND(count(distinct {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }})*100/Customer_Count,2) Distribution from KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW a left join total on lower(a.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) = total.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }} where 1=1 {{ .DefaultFilters2 }} and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", {{ .Date }}) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}') and {{ .Product }} in (select {{ .Product }} from (select {{ .Product }}, count(distinct {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) customer_count from KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW where 1=1 {{ .DefaultFilters2 }} {{ .PSU }} and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", {{ .Date }}) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}') group by {{ .Product }} order by customer_count desc limit 5)) group by {{ .Product }}, {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, Customer_Count order by Distribution asc ) SELECT * FROM bigtable PIVOT(SUM(Distribution) AS Distribution FOR {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }} in %s) order by {{ .Product }} """, {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }})

queries.name: Product Breakdown Table
queries.templated_query:
WITH 
    Data 
AS
( 
SELECT 
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(m.Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN m
-- CROSS JOIN
--     Total_Pv_Table b
WHERE 1=1
    {{if (ne .product_name "") }} AND (Lines_of_Business_Level_Description IN {{ .product_name }} ) {{end}}
GROUP BY 
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000
)

,Total_Pv_Table 
AS
(
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Total_PV
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN
GROUP BY 
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000    
)

SELECT 
    *
FROM
(
SELECT 
    Product,
    m.Date,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    -- Total_PV,
    CONCAT
    (
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END, ' ',
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)
    )  
    AS 
        Month_And_Year,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN TRUE THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END) / Total_PV, 0),2) AS Total_Perc
FROM
    Data m
LEFT JOIN
    Total_Pv_Table b
ON 
    m.Date = b.Date
WHERE 1=1
    {{ if (ne .Date_Selector_Start "") }} AND m.Date >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date_Selector_Start }}) {{ end }} 
    {{ if (ne .Date_Selector_End "") }} AND m.Date <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date_Selector_End }}) {{ end }}
-- WHERE 1=1
--      AND m.Date >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-01')  
--      AND m.Date <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-17') 
GROUP BY 
    Product,
    Total_PV,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    Month_And_Year,
    m.Date
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC
LIMIT 1000
)
WHERE 1=1
    {{if (ne .fil_year_Month "") }} AND (Month_And_Year IN {{ .fil_year_Month }} ) {{end}}
LIMIT 3000

queries.name: Regional Category Distribution
queries.templated_query:
WITH top20 AS (
  SELECT 
    {{ .Product }},
    SUM({{ .Value }}) AS {{ .Value }}
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
    {{ .PSU }}
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
    AND {{ .Product }} IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.{{ .Product }}') AS {{ .Product }}
      FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details`
      --WHERE opportunity_Type = '939e5ed7-02d1-40b4-b8ce-3cb9aea64148'
    )
  GROUP BY 
    {{ .Product }}
  ORDER BY 
    {{ .Value }} DESC
  LIMIT 20
),
total AS (
  SELECT 
    LOWER({{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}) AS {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }},
    {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }},
    COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) AS Customer_Count
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
    {{ .PSU }}
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
  GROUP BY 
    {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}
)
SELECT 
  {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }},
  {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }},
  ROUND(100 * SUM(cust_count) / NULLIF((AVG(customer_count) * AVG(sku_total)), 0), 2) AS Distribution
FROM (
  SELECT 
    a.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }},
    a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }},
    {{ .Product }},
    COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) AS cust_count,
    Customer_Count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Product }}) OVER (PARTITION BY a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}) AS sku_total
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW` a
  LEFT JOIN 
    total ON LOWER(a.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}) = total.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }} AND a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }} = total.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    {{ .DefaultFilters3 }}
    {{ .PSU }}
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
    AND a.{{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }} IS NOT NULL
    AND a.{{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }} IS NOT NULL
    AND {{ .Product }} IN (SELECT DISTINCT {{ .Product }} FROM top20)
  GROUP BY 
    {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product }}, Customer_Count
)
GROUP BY 
  {{ .Area_Hierarchy_1 }}, {{ .Product_Hierarchy_1 }};

queries.name: Most distributed product
queries.templated_query:
DECLARE {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }} STRING;

SET {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }} = (
    SELECT CONCAT('("', STRING_AGG(DISTINCT {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, '", "'), '")')
    FROM (
        WITH total AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER({{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) AS {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }},
                COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) AS Customer_Count
            FROM 
                KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW 
            WHERE 
                1 = 1 
                {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
                {{ .PSU }}
                AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
            GROUP BY {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}
        )
        SELECT 
            REPLACE(a.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, '/', '_') AS {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }},
            {{ .Product }},
            ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }}) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution
        FROM 
            KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW a
        LEFT JOIN 
            total ON LOWER(a.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}) = total.{{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}
        WHERE 
            1 = 1 
            {{ .DefaultFilters2 }}
            AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date }}) BETWEEN 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')
        GROUP BY 
            {{ .Product }}, {{ .Customer_Hierarchy_1 }}, Customer_Count
        ORDER BY 
            Distribution ASC

queries.name: User Vals Heat Map
queries.templated_query:
WITH assign_split AS ( 
SELECT DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date_Resolved), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS Date_Resolved, assigned_to, opportunity_type, Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Resolved, 
split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to, 
opportunity_type, 
ROUND(m_value*7,2) as Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_archive` AS archive 
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id 
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
--{{ .LevelFilterPSU }} 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1 
) 
WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date_Resolved) between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionStart }}') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '{{ .DateSelectionEnd }}')), 
opportunity_type_ranking AS ( 
SELECT Ranking, opportunity_type, Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (Order by Value DESC) AS Ranking, opportunity_type, Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT opportunity_type, SUM(Value) AS Value 
FROM assign_split 
GROUP BY opportunity_type)) 
WHERE Ranking <= 10) 
SELECT Date_Resolved, a.assigned_to, a.opportunity_type, a.Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT Date_Resolved, assigned_to, opportunity_type, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(Value),2),0) AS Value 
FROM assign_split 
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to 
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL 
AND TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to), '\"') = {{ .User }} 
AND opportunity_type IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY Date_Resolved, assigned_to, opportunity_type 
ORDER BY Date_Resolved 
) a 
INNER JOIN opportunity_type_ranking 
ON a.opportunity_type = opportunity_type_ranking.opportunity_type 
ORDER BY Value desc

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.templated_query:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.10 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_1,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.15 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_2,

     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
)
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, Fair_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
Good_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (
SELECT Date, 
NSV_Without_Keystone,
SUM(NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS NSV_Without_Keystone_Cum,

SUM(Fair_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Fair_Case_with_Keystone,
SUM(Good_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Good_Case_with_Keystone,
SUM(Excellent_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,

from (
SELECT 
    SALES.Month as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value, 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_1, 0), 2) as Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_2, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,


FROM SALES 

WHERE SALES.Month BETWEEN DATE('2023-01-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date)
)

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.templated_query:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue
     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) BETWEEN DATE(2023, 8, 1) AND DATE(2024, 3, 1)
    GROUP BY WEEK
),
KEY as (with daterange as (SELECT Week, row_number() over(order by Week asc) as row_num from (SELECT
  distinct DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week
FROM
  UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY('2023-01-01', '2023-12-12')) AS Date))
select Week, SUM(Value) Value from (
select daterange.Week Week, sum(m_value) Value from (
SELECT *, NTILE(31) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS date_rank from 
(
  SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, NTILE(100) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS perc_rank from KEYSTONE.COKE_card_details) where perc_rank >= 5 and perc_rank <= 20
)
order by date_rank desc)
left join daterange 
on date_rank = row_num 
group by Week
order by Week asc) 
group by Week



) 
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (

SELECT 
    SALES.Week as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(Value, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Week = KEY.Week
WHERE SALES.Week BETWEEN DATE('2023-02-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date
)

queries.name: Product Vs PV Per Month
queries.templated_query:
WITH 
    Data 
AS
( 
SELECT 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN 
GROUP BY 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000
)

,DateRange 
AS 
(
  SELECT 
    MAX(Date) AS max_date
  FROM 
    Data
)

,mainT
AS
(
SELECT 
    Product,
    m.Date As Date,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    CONCAT
    (
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END, ' ',
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)
    )  
    AS 
        Month_And_Year,
FROM
    Data m,
    DateRange r
WHERE 1=1
AND 
    m.Date 
        BETWEEN 
            DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  
        AND
            r.max_date
GROUP BY 
    Product,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    Month_And_Year,
    m.Date
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC
LIMIT 3000
)

SELECT
    Product,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = max_date THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_3,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_2,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_1
FROM
    mainT,
    DateRange r
GROUP BY
    Product

WITH 
    Data 
AS
( 
SELECT 
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(m.Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN m
-- CROSS JOIN
--     Total_Pv_Table b
WHERE 1=1
    {{if (ne .product_name "") }} AND (Lines_of_Business_Level_Description IN {{ .product_name }} ) {{end}}
GROUP BY 
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000
)

,Total_Pv_Table 
AS
(
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Total_PV
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN
GROUP BY 
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000    
)

SELECT 
    *
FROM
(
SELECT 
    Product,
    m.Date,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    -- Total_PV,
    CONCAT
    (
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END, ' ',
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)
    )  
    AS 
        Month_And_Year,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN TRUE THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END) / Total_PV, 0),2) AS Total_Perc
FROM
    Data m
LEFT JOIN
    Total_Pv_Table b
ON 
    m.Date = b.Date
WHERE 1=1
    {{ if (ne .Date_Selector_Start "") }} AND m.Date >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date_Selector_Start }}) {{ end }} 
    {{ if (ne .Date_Selector_End "") }} AND m.Date <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date_Selector_End }}) {{ end }}
-- WHERE 1=1
--      AND m.Date >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-01')  
--      AND m.Date <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-17') 
GROUP BY 
    Product,
    Total_PV,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    Month_And_Year,
    m.Date
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC
LIMIT 1000
)
WHERE 1=1
    {{if (ne .fil_year_Month "") }} AND (Month_And_Year IN {{ .fil_year_Month }} ) {{end}}
LIMIT 3000

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.templated_query:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.10 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_1,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.15 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_2,

     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
),
KEY as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
from KEYSTONE.COKE_impact_graph 
    GROUP BY Month
) 
SELECT 
    SALES.Month as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value, 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_1, 0), 2) as Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_2, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Month = KEY.Month
WHERE SALES.Month BETWEEN DATE('2023-01-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date

queries.name: Price Last Sold
queries.templated_query:
with daterange as (

SELECT DATE_TRUNC(day, WEEK) week
FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS day
where day BETWEEN  date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE() group by week),

test as (
SELECT ifnull({{.Qty}},0) as {{.Qty}}, round({{.Value}}) Value, week
FROM (
SELECT ROUND(sum({{.Value}}),2) as {{.Value}},   ROUND(sum({{.Qty}}),2) as {{.Qty}}, 
DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{.Date}}), WEEK) as week 
FROM 
KEYSTONE_{{.company_name}}.SALES_VIEW 
where PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring({{.Date}},1,10)) 
between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and {{.Product}} = {{.name}}
and {{.Area_Hierarchy_3}} = {{.display_value}}
and {{.Qty}} > 0
group by  DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{.Date}}), WEEK)))

select daterange.week, coalesce(Value,0) as Value
from daterange
left JOIN test
on daterange.week = test.week
where daterange.week between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE()
limit 1

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.templated_query:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue
     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) BETWEEN DATE(2023, 8, 1) AND DATE(2024, 3, 1)
    GROUP BY WEEK
),
KEY as (with daterange as (SELECT Week, row_number() over(order by Week asc) as row_num from (SELECT
  distinct DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week
FROM
  UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY('2023-08-01', '2023-12-12')) AS Date))
select Week, SUM(Value) Value from (
select daterange.Week Week, sum(m_value) Value from (
SELECT *, NTILE(31) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS date_rank from 
(
  SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, NTILE(100) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS perc_rank from KEYSTONE.COKE_card_details) where perc_rank >= 5 and perc_rank <= 20
)
order by date_rank desc)
left join daterange 
on date_rank = row_num 
group by Week
order by Week asc) 
group by Week



) 
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (
SELECT Date, 
NSV_Without_Keystone,
SUM(Excellent_Case_with_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,

from (
SELECT 
    SALES.Week as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(Value, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Week = KEY.Week
WHERE SALES.Week BETWEEN DATE('2023-01-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')

))

queries.name: Date Last Sold - Column Chart
queries.templated_query:
with daterange as (

SELECT DATE_TRUNC(day, WEEK) week
FROM UNNEST(
GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
) AS day
where day between  date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE()
group by week),

test as (
SELECT IFNULL({{ .Value }},0) Net_Sales_Value, week
FROM (
SELECT ROUND(sum({{ .Value }}),2) as {{ .Value }},  DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date }}), WEEK) as week 
FROM KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.SALES_VIEW

where PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring({{ .Date }},1,10)) 
between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
and {{ .Product }} = {{ .name }}
and {{ .Area_Hierarchy_3 }} = {{ .display_value }}
and {{ .Qty }} > 0
group by  DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{ .Date }}), WEEK)
))

select daterange.week, coalesce(Net_Sales_Value,0) as Net_Sales_Value
from daterange
left JOIN test
on daterange.week = test.week
where daterange.week between  date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY)  
and CURRENT_DATE()

queries.name: Potential Gain

select kl.name as Status
from KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_details d 
inner join KEYSTONE.{{ .ClientName }}_card_status s 
on d.id = s.id
inner join KEYSTONE.kanban_lists kl 
on s.list_id = kl.id
INNER JOIN KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.Custom_Opportunity_Type COT
on d.opportunity_type = COT.ID
inner join KEYSTONE_{{ .ClientName }}.Opportunity_Type OT
on COT.Opportunity_Type_ID = OT.ID
where d.id = {{ .ID }}

queries.name: Price Last Sold
queries.templated_query:
with daterange as (

SELECT DATE_TRUNC(day, WEEK) week
FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS day
where day BETWEEN  date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE() group by week),

test as (
SELECT ifnull({{.Qty}},0) as {{.Qty}}, IFNULL(round({{.Value}}/{{.Qty}}),0) Price, week
FROM (
SELECT ROUND(sum({{.Value}}),2) as {{.Value}},   ROUND(sum({{.Qty}}),2) as {{.Qty}}, 
DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{.Date}}), WEEK) as week 
FROM 
KEYSTONE_{{.company_name}}.SALES_VIEW 
where PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring({{.Date}},1,10)) 
between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and {{.Product}} = {{.name}}
and {{.Area_Hierarchy_3}} = {{.display_value}}
and {{.Qty}} > 0
group by  DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", {{.Date}}), WEEK)))

select daterange.week, coalesce({{.Qty}},0) as {{.Qty}}, coalesce(Price,0) as Price
from daterange
left JOIN test
on daterange.week = test.week
where daterange.week between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE()
